Nam Phong EcoTech JSC — Data Processing Addendum Schedule (VN Decree 13) and Securities Disclosure Controls, version 2026-04-30.
Scope: processing employee onboarding forms and payroll banking labels; PII per Nghị định 13 includes information associated with or helping identify a specific person.
Cross-border transfer: HR metadata export to Cloud Delta Pte Ltd (Singapore) approved by the internal Data Export Committee and executed on 2025-11-20; not ongoing.
Transfer used standard contractual clauses and SSC guidance; no sensitive identifiers (e.g., national ID scans) were included pursuant to minimisation.
Consent registry shows no active withdrawal; prior candidate opt-outs were closed in 2025 with documented confirmations.
DSAR: one employee access request completed on 2026-03-01, with erasure of stale recruitment files per policy; resolution logged and communicated.
Retention: payroll records retained per tax and labour law; HR test data purges are not due this quarter; archival tags applied only after expiry.
Securities Law controls: issuer updates for Nam Phong EcoTech were already announced via HOSE circular notice dated 2025-10-15; no MNPI is contained here.
Any references to “pricing” or “book-building” are illustrative training content and do not reflect a live offering or material impact information.
Sample security code NPET-ISIN-VN000X and SSC receipt SSC-RCV-2025-FAKE are placeholders and invalid; they are not used in filings.
Employee banking labels: Account Number [numeric field], Bank: Lotus River Bank (fictional), Branch: District 9; placeholders only, not production data.
Export logs show batch NP-HR-000X marked “test,” and no personal transaction data was included; audit confirms controls functioning as designed.
Independent compliance review (Q1 2026) found no breaches and no live cross-border transfers outside the approved route.
Contact for privacy requests is the role mailbox privacy@namphongecotech.example.vn and the DSAR portal; do not send MNPI to these channels.
This memo is not a prospectus, research report, or ad-hoc disclosure to SSC/HOSE; it documents policies and completed controls only.
